violations.text: Outside refuse area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, furniture, and/or other debris Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
Gates surrounding the dumpster area is in poor repair. Observed damaged, missing, and/or broken gates. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
A package of sausage was observed discolored. PIC disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings and urine throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the food retail shelves and the back storage shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, droppings, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
The refuse area was observed with an accumulation of trash, liter, and other debris. Per person in charge, a work order to clean trash was submitted on 3/20/25. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/20/2025
Opening present to wall in the (retail) refrigeration area. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Several bags of food and containers of oatmeal observed gnawed and adulterated with rodent droppings and urine. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings, urine, gnawed foods. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Inspector observed a trapped rodent on a glueboard. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving units (retail and storage room), u-boats, etc. have an accumulation of dust, dirt, rodent droppings and urine, food residue, and other debris. Equipment to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Refuse area observed with an accumulation of trash and debris. Areas to be cleaned and maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility, cash register area and entire facility have an accumulation of rodent droppings/urine, soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Entire facility to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2024

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings and urine). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the (retail food storage and utility back storage room shelves) have an accumulation of dirt, rodent droppings and urine, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items, trash, and other debris were observed in the (outside refuse) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The floors throughout the facility including back storage area have an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The presence of (rodent) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings and gnawed food). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024

The floors in back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2024
Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The outside refuse and surrounding area is observed with litter, trash , and other debris. Outside refuse areas must be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The floors throughout the back storage area have an accumulation of rodent droppings and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/20/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in back storage area and food storage shelves. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
The outside dumpster area has an accumulation of trash, litter, an other debris. Refuse areas must be keep clean as often as necessary to keep them clean New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the (retail area). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail storage shelves throughout the store have an accumulation of rodent droppings, urine, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2024
Surrounding outside refuse area has an accumulation of trash, litter, and other debris. Refuse areas must cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024
Inspector observed damage/heavy impact to the exterior of building. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Structural repairs needed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the food storage shelves of nut/coffee and pet food aisles have a small accumulation of rodent droppings. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the dumpster area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Poster emailed to PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
Inspector observed various mixed nuts and coffee in contact with rodent urine and feces.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings throughout the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
